jadecli/jadecli-plugins.tagline: Claude Code plugin marketplace for jadecli team

adaptive-agent.description: Self-adapting agent bootstrap for any codebase. Auto-discovers conventions, enforces git safety, manages context, and ensures every change compounds existing effort.
skills: bootstrap — codebase reconnaissance before any action
compounding-review — 6-axis code review for integration quality
surface-awareness — detects CLI/Desktop/VS Code/Web/GitHub Actions surface
adaptive-agent.hooks: PreToolUse warnings on one-way-door git ops (push, merge, rebase, reset, delete)

devtools.description: macOS developer tooling installer and configurator for Claude Code workflows.

jadecli/knowledge-work-plugins.tagline: Plugins that turn Claude into a specialist for your role, team, and company

productivity.connectors: Slack, Notion, Asana, Linear, Jira, Monday, ClickUp, Microsoft 365

sales.connectors: Slack, HubSpot, Close, Clay, ZoomInfo, Notion, Jira, Fireflies, Microsoft 365

customer-support.connectors: Slack, Intercom, HubSpot, Guru, Jira, Notion, Microsoft 365

product-management.connectors: Slack, Linear, Asana, Monday, ClickUp, Jira, Notion, Figma, Amplitude, Pendo, Intercom, Fireflies

marketing.connectors: Slack, Canva, Figma, HubSpot, Amplitude, Notion, Ahrefs, SimilarWeb, Klaviyo

data.connectors: Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Hex, Amplitude, Jira

enterprise-search.connectors: Slack, Notion, Guru, Jira, Asana, Microsoft 365

bio-research.connectors: PubMed, BioRender, bioRxiv, ClinicalTrials.gov, ChEMBL, Synapse, Wiley, Owkin, Open Targets, Benchling

jadecli/token-budget-guard.tagline: Deterministic tool call budgets, loop detection, and circuit breaking for Claude Code
jadecli/token-budget-guard.implementation: Pure bash + jq, zero tokens consumed
jadecli/token-budget-guard.mechanism: PreToolUse hook that runs before every tool call
checks_in_order: 1. Over budget? → BLOCK (hard stop at BUDGET_LIMIT)
2a. Identical call loop? → BLOCK (same tool + same args repeated LOOP_THRESHOLD times in LOOP_WINDOW)
2b. Same tool repeated? → WARN (same tool, different args, TOOL_REPEAT_THRESHOLD times)
3. Getting close to budget? → WARN (at BUDGET_WARN %)

jadecli/knowledge-teams-plugins.tagline: S-team compose layer + WebMCP tools — extends Anthropic's knowledge-work-plugins

s-team.description: System prompts for 10 C-suite agent roles + template
s-team.note: Each mapped to a safety-research repo and fitness function

structure.extensions: Jade overlay skills + commands (win in conflict resolution over upstream)
structure.webmcp: TypeScript tool stubs for jadecli.app (agent intranet) and jadecli.com (marketplace)
structure.compose: Loader, resolver, manifest generator — reads upstream-ref.json to locate upstream plugin definitions

L0_infrastructure.role: Safety net for all Claude Code sessions
L0_infrastructure.relationship_to_org: Protects token spend across all jadecli org members using Claude Code. Runs before any tool call regardless of which plugins are active.

L1_engineering_process.role: How Claude operates inside codebases — the engineering methodology layer

integration_points.adaptive_agent_to_skills: The adaptive-agent skills (bootstrap, git-safety, context-management, compounding-review, tool-orchestration, surface-awareness) are the Claude Code equivalent of the Claude.ai Skills panel. Both teach Claude process knowledge, but skills in Claude.ai are for the web UI while plugin skills are for Claude Code CLI/Desktop.
integration_points.adaptive_agent_to_connectors: The git-safety hooks + surface-awareness skill complement the GitHub connector in Claude.ai — one operates at the CLI level (hooks enforce safety), the other at the web level (connector provides read/write API access).
integration_points.devtools_to_starred_project: The devtools-plugin configures the local dev environment. The starred project 'jade-sdk-monolith' is likely where these tools get exercised — the monolith repo that all plugins target.
integration_points.to_token_budget_guard: token-budget-guard's PreToolUse hook and adaptive-agent's PreToolUse hook coexist — budget-guard prevents runaway loops while adaptive-agent's hook warns on destructive git ops. Both fire on every tool call.

L2_knowledge_work_roles.role: Role-based plugins — what Claude knows about each job function

integration_points.to_connectors: The 11 KWP plugins reference connectors (Slack, Linear, Sentry, Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Vercel, etc.) that are ALREADY connected in the Claude.ai org. The org's connected connectors are the runtime backing for what KWP plugins declare in their .mcp.json files.
integration_points.to_skills: KWP plugins bundle skills per role (e.g. productivity/skills/, sales/skills/). These are complementary to but separate from the Anthropic-authored Claude.ai skills. Claude.ai skills are creative/design-oriented; KWP skills are business-function-oriented.
integration_points.to_adaptive_agent: KWP provides 'what to do' (role knowledge), adaptive-agent provides 'how to operate' (engineering process). Install both.

L3_executive_orchestration.role: S-team compose layer — turns KWP role plugins into coordinated C-suite agents

integration_points.to_knowledge_work_plugins: Directly extends jadecli/knowledge-work-plugins via compose layer. upstream-ref.json pins the exact commit.
integration_points.to_connectors: WebMCP tool stubs (jadecli.app intranet, jadecli.com marketplace) are NEW connectors that don't exist in the Claude.ai org yet.
integration_points.s_team_to_org: The 10 C-suite roles each get a system prompt mapped to a safety-research repo and fitness function. Top of the stack.
integration_points.to_adaptive_agent: Each S-team agent inherits adaptive-agent's engineering process in code contexts, and KWP role knowledge in business contexts.

already_connected_in_org.GitHub: Used by: adaptive-agent (git-safety, merge-prs), all engineering workflows
already_connected_in_org.Gmail: Used by: productivity, sales, customer-support, enterprise-search KWP plugins
already_connected_in_org.Google Drive: Used by: productivity, enterprise-search KWP plugins
already_connected_in_org.Linear: Used by: productivity, product-management KWP plugins
already_connected_in_org.Slack: Used by: nearly ALL KWP plugins (9 of 11)
already_connected_in_org.Sentry: Used by: engineering debugging workflows, adaptive-agent review
already_connected_in_org.Context7: Used by: mcp-builder skill (code docs lookup)

skills_overlap.claude_ai_skills_are: Creative/design/meta tooling for the Claude.ai web interface
skills_overlap.plugin_skills_are: Engineering process + business role knowledge for Claude Code CLI/Desktop
skills_overlap.overlap: doc-coauthoring (Claude.ai) and productivity KWP plugin both address document workflows but at different surfaces. internal-comms (Claude.ai) and marketing/sales KWP plugins both address comms but for different audiences.
skills_overlap.complementary_pattern: Enable Claude.ai skills for web-based creative work. Install plugins for CLI-based engineering and business work. The org identity ties both surfaces to the same team.

the_full_stack: token-budget-guard    → prevents runaway sessions (bash hook, every tool call)
jadecli-plugins       → engineering methodology (adaptive-agent + devtools, Claude Code)
knowledge-work-plugins → role-based business knowledge (11 plugins, Claude Code + Cowork)
knowledge-teams-plugins → S-team orchestration (10 C-suite agents compose over KWP, WebMCP tools)
Claude.ai org skills   → creative/design skills (10 Anthropic skills, web UI)
Claude.ai org connectors → runtime tool access (9 connectors, shared across surfaces)
